top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.A2 = 'South Bohemia' 
  AND c.client_id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT cl.client_id
    FROM client cl
    JOIN disp dp ON cl.client_id = dp.client_id
    JOIN card cd ON dp.disp_id = cd.disp_id
  );

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
LEFT JOIN disp dp ON c.client_id = dp.client_id
LEFT JOIN card ca ON dp.disp_id = ca.disp_id
WHERE d.A2 = 'South Bohemia' 
  AND ca.card_id IS NULL;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.A2 = 'South Bohemia' 
  AND c.client_id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT cl.client_id
    FROM client cl
    JOIN disp dp ON cl.client_id = dp.client_id
    JOIN card cd ON dp.disp_id = cd.disp_id
  );

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.A2 = 'South Bohemia' 
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM disp dp
    JOIN card cd ON dp.disp_id = cd.disp_id
    WHERE dp.client_id = c.client_id
  );

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
LEFT JOIN disp dp ON c.client_id = dp.client_id
LEFT JOIN card ca ON dp.disp_id = ca.disp_id
WHERE d.A2 = 'South Bohemia' 
  AND ca.card_id IS NULL;

    FROM client cl

    JOIN card cd ON dp.disp_id = cd.disp_id
  );

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.A2 = 'South Bohemia' 
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM disp dp
    JOIN card cd ON dp.disp_id = cd.disp_id
    WHERE dp.client_id = c.client_id
  );

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
LEFT JOIN disp dp ON c.client_id = dp.client_id
LEFT JOIN card ca ON dp.disp_id = ca.disp_id
WHERE d.A2 = 'South Bohemia' 
  AND ca.card_id IS NULL;

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.A2 = 'South Bohemia' 
  AND c.client_id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT cl.client_id
    FROM client cl
    JOIN disp dp ON cl.client_id = dp.client_id
    JOIN card cd ON dp.disp_id = cd.disp_id
  );
